meaning: n.(姝ｅ綋)鐞嗙敱,(鍚堢悊)鏍规嵁,鎺堟潈,鎷呬繚,淇濊瘉,鏍规嵁
examples: Is the car still under warranty ?
The television comes with a full two-year warranty.
Is the laptop still under warranty?
My system came with eight dimly photocopied pages devoted mostly to support, warranty and return policies.
Warning: Opening your Xbox will void the warranty and carelessness will cause damage to your machine.
